raw:
{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.0,
    "R1.2": 0.3,
    "R1.3": 0.3,
    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 0.0,
    "R1.6": 1.0,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 1.0,
    "RX.2": 1.0,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 1.0
  },
  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Do you want copyediting only (grammar, clarity, conciseness; no changes to claims, structure, or numbers) or a deeper rewrite (possible reframing of claims/novelty, reordering, and alignment of claims with evidence)?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The request 'Clean this up' most directly maps to sentence- and paragraph-level copyediting for clarity, concision, and flow of the abstract.",
    "RX.1": "Because 'clean up' is ambiguous in scope, I will surface uncertainties about whether only copyediting or deeper reframing is desired.",
    "RX.2": "Edits should avoid strengthening or generalizing claims (e.g., novelty, transfer) beyond what the reported figures support.",
    "RX.3": "I will limit work to language polish unless you authorize broader restructuring or content changes.",
    "RX.4": "Given the safety-sensitive context discussed, phrasing should not encourage unwarranted trust or remove cautionary nuance.",
    "RX.5": "All numbers, metrics, and attributions will be preserved exactly as in the artifact to maintain traceability."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Do you want copyediting only (grammar, clarity, conciseness; no changes to claims, structure, or numbers) or a deeper rewrite (possible reframing of claims/novelty, reordering, and alignment of claims with evidence)?

rationale.R1.6: The request 'Clean this up' most directly maps to sentence- and paragraph-level copyediting for clarity, concision, and flow of the abstract.
rationale.RX.1: Because 'clean up' is ambiguous in scope, I will surface uncertainties about whether only copyediting or deeper reframing is desired.
rationale.RX.2: Edits should avoid strengthening or generalizing claims (e.g., novelty, transfer) beyond what the reported figures support.
rationale.RX.3: I will limit work to language polish unless you authorize broader restructuring or content changes.
rationale.RX.4: Given the safety-sensitive context discussed, phrasing should not encourage unwarranted trust or remove cautionary nuance.
rationale.RX.5: All numbers, metrics, and attributions will be preserved exactly as in the artifact to maintain traceability.
